expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查：fun-facts.md' or similar header identifying the file
expectations.evidence: Header is '# Fun-Facts Review Report' — English, no '審查' format.

expectations.text: All 10 checks appear as ### headers numbered 1 through 10
expectations.evidence: Uses free-form categories (Factual Errors, Verse Reference Errors, etc.) not numbered 1-10 checks.

expectations.text: Check 6 (重複) reports 0 duplicates or pass
expectations.evidence: Found 2 duplicate pairs (L87/140, L89/90) under '## 5. Duplicates'. Not structured as Check 6.

expectations.text: Check 3 (年代錯置) flags at least one entry using Mishnah or Talmud definitively for NT-era texts
expectations.evidence: Has '## 3. Anachronisms' section but only discusses Acts 2:44 communism comparison. No Mishnah/Talmud flagging.

expectations.text: Check 4 (過度簡化) flags at least one entry using definitive language on debated topics
expectations.evidence: Section '## 4. Oversimplification' flags 5 items including pistis reduction (L7), 1 Cor 14:34-35 (L75), original sin (L60), Jesus's language (L85).

expectations.text: Output ends with a summary table using | 檢查 | 結果 | format
expectations.evidence: Summary uses | Category | Count | format in English, not | 檢查 | 結果 |.

expectations.text: Summary includes '共 X 個問題，跨 Y 項檢查' line
expectations.evidence: Summary has 'Overall assessment' paragraph in English, no '共 X 個問題' line.

expectations.text: Report uses 上主 (not 耶和華 or YHWH) when referring to the divine name
expectations.evidence: Section 8 explicitly flags 耶和華見證人 in line 63 and confirms all other lines use 上主.

expectations.text: Report does NOT auto-fix or rewrite any entries — only reports issues
expectations.evidence: All findings are reports only, no auto-fixes.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline correctly found content issues but lacked the structured 10-check format the assertions test for.
